description: Axiom-owned canonical Hails render contract — promoted from accepted preview v001 (presentation-polish-acceptance-candidate). LCARD and other Control Alt apps consume this artifact; they do not define the Hail visual model.

ownership.note: Axiom owns Hails and this shared contract. LCARD hosts/consumes the preview harness only — not the Hail visual model, Paint Box, named effects, or budget canon.

runtimeModel.note: Runtime/end-user Hail selection uses size tier + named effect id — not raw beam width, particle density, glow radius, or similar workbench-only knobs.

lifecycleModel.note: duration_ms on hail records and runtime payloads maps to stable_hold_ms only. Entrance and exit animation ms are additive per named effect lifecycleTiming.
lifecycleModel.stable_hold_ms: Stable readable phase — duration_ms / presets map here
lifecycleModel.holdMode: entrance -> stable indefinitely -> Hide triggers exit -> clear

effects.note: Runtime named effect ids — not legacy transporter_beam

previewVisual.note: Axiom-owned preview visual contract — consumed by LCARD preview workbench and future Control Alt apps. Workbench-only blocks (effectPresets, presetPresence, legacy effectPresetIds) exist for tuning; runtime model uses namedEffects + paintBox + effectsBudget.

paintBox.note: Paint Box = absolute maximum layout container. Safe Effect Zone = normal effect maximum (inset). Glyph Focus Region = primary effect anchor. Message Region = secondary readable support. Hierarchy: Paint Box -> Safe Effect Zone -> Glyph Focus Region -> Effect Envelope -> Message Support.
paintBox.canon: The Paint Box defines where the Hail may exist; the glyph defines what the Hail is. Glyph visual height = max(glyphVisualSizeFloorPx, paintBoxHeight × glyphVisualFraction). Effects render inside Safe Effect Zone and anchor to Glyph Focus Region.

namedEffects.note: Recallable named effect presets selected by id at runtime. Workbench may expose advanced tuning; end-user contract is effect id only.

identityModel.note: Named effects define how the glyph resolves, not just the surrounding field.

fields.glyphResolveStyle: How the glyph itself materializes (fade, overshoot_pop, center_snap, scan_resolve)
fields.particleStyle: Particle behavior alias (none, tiny_sparks, radial_burst, scanfall)
fields.messageRevealStyle: Message timing relative to glyph (fade, quick_follow, post_impact_fade, secondary_scan_fade)

choreographyModel.note: Effect/glyph/message timing anchors as fractions of entrance_ms (0–1). Glyph resolve is a consequence of the effect timeline.

fields.glyphImpactPeak: Perceptual peak — pop overshoot, burst snap, transporter scan midpoint
fields.glyphLockIn: Glyph sharpens to stable readable form
fields.messageRevealStart: Message reveal begins (after glyph focal moment)
fields.stableReady: Entrance choreography complete; stable hold begins

pop.label: Pop
pop.intent: Quick punchy entrance/exit — obvious glyph-local pop moment

burst.label: Burst
burst.intent: Size-aware burst entrance/exit — visible contained flare/spark at glyph

transporter.label: Transporter
transporter.intent: Contained glyph-local transport field — establishes before glyph resolves; stable has no beam
transporter.sequence: empty -> contained transport field in Paint Box -> glyph/message materialize -> field clears -> stable object -> exit field -> dematerialize -> clear

effectRegistry.note: Extensible effect catalog — identityRef pulls lifecycle/identity from namedEffects.effects during migration. Phase A foundation; tuning persisted in Phase C.

soft-tap.label: Soft Tap
soft-tap.reference: Gentle glyph-local ping — baseline micro flash and tiny sparks

snap-back.label: Snap Back
snap-back.reference: Rubber-band overshoot — faster lock-in, sharper flash

bubble-pop.label: Bubble Pop
bubble-pop.reference: Wider soft bloom with extra spark scatter

capabilities.android_note: Harness-only — TV-safe defaults refined Phase D

pulse.label: Pulse
pulse.reference: Contained radial bloom — baseline priority snap

solar-flare.label: Solar Flare
solar-flare.reference: Hotter bloom with earlier impact peak

rippler.label: Rippler
rippler.reference: Wide particle ring with softer bloom edge

capabilities.android_note: Harness-only — TV-safe default tuning refined Phase D

voyaging.label: Voyaging
voyaging.reference: Voyager-style transporter cycle — narrow filament column, scanfall, phased glyph scan-resolve

generation-next.label: Generation Next
generation-next.reference: Blue-forward shimmer column with softer lock-in

spoon.label: Spoon
spoon.reference: Golden amber dense column with harder edge

capabilities.android_note: TV transporter_beam consumes beam_intensity and beam_scale; beam_shape and beam_color_emphasis are preview-only on device

effectsBudget.note: Budget resolved by size + effect + lifecycle phase. hidden/cleared: zero animation, particle, and canvas work.

stable.note: Cheap and readable — no persistent transporter beam, full-screen glow, or ongoing field column

legacyEffectPresets.note: Legacy workbench preset ids (effectPresetIds) retained for tuning UI backward compatibility. Runtime/end-user model uses namedEffects.allowlist — map via aliasesToNamedEffects.

presenceGrammar.note: Preview-only presence per S/M/L tier. object_scale (content_scale) sizes the stable Hail; transport_event_scale sizes beam-in/out only — not applied during stable_object. Canonical values live on scaleGrammar.tiers.

fields.content_scale: Object scale — glyph + content module layout (alias: object_scale)
fields.object_scale: Alias for content_scale — stable Hail object size
fields.transport_event_scale: Beam-in/out transport envelope — dramatic during enter/exit, zeroed at stable_object
fields.effect_field_scale: Stable-state residual field (preview: 1.0 — transport uses transport_event_scale)
fields.glow_radius_scale: Transport glow reach during materialization; modest stable glyph glow via renderer

small.label: Ambient
small.intent: Compact Hail object with a small beam-in/out transport event

medium.label: Default
medium.intent: Default readable Hail object with balanced transport event

large.label: Impact
large.intent: Larger Hail object and more dramatic transport — clean stable object after beam clears

previewVisual.effectPresetIdsNote: DEPRECATED workbench-only — prefer namedEffects.allowlist. Aliases in legacyEffectPresets.aliasesToNamedEffects.

presetPresence.note: Preview-only — per-preset transport presence; stacks with scaleGrammar tiers. transport_event_scale applies during beam-in/out only.

clean_hail.label: Compact
clean_hail.intent: Minimal transport — tight beam-in/out, restrained glow

transporter_soft.label: Standard
transporter_soft.intent: Default transporter — balanced transport, clean stable object

transporter_dense.label: Impact
transporter_dense.intent: Stronger materialization transport — stable object still clean after arrival

subtle_ping.label: Burst
subtle_ping.intent: Quick achievement transport — tight beam, punchy anchor

high_attention.label: Visible
high_attention.intent: High-visibility transport in/out — stable object clear, not alarm styling

animationProfiles.note: Per-preset animation. Optional overrides: beam_in_seed_ms, beam_out_seed_ms (defaults scale from lifecyclePhases.reference).

beamHandoff.operatorSignoff: 2026-06-14 — Arcade LCARD send + Voyager beam handoffs verified
beamHandoff.note: Beam_clear and beam_out_seed use easeInOutCubic crossfades — column reveal tapers during clear; exit seed ends at intensity 0.35 / scale 0.92 before dematerialize.
beamHandoff.wallClockEasing: linear — lifecycle fractions map 1:1 to entrance/exit ms on device

transporterVariationChoreography.note: Locked choreography anchors (fraction of entrance_ms) per transporter variation — VFX definitions v001.

transporterVariationVfx.note: Slice 4 — per-variation VFX layer toggles. APK TransporterVfxLayers + Axiom hailTransporterVfxLayers.ts.

lifecyclePhases.note: Object materialization lifecycle. entrance_ms splits into beam_in_seed + materializing_object; exit_ms splits into beam_out_seed + dematerializing_object. Reference values match transporter VFX canon (Dan Curry / LCARD animation-profile).

placementPresence.note: Preview-only — per-placement effect field caps, overflow allowance, and safe edge offsets. Applied after scale grammar; does not change tier base values.

top_right.label: Top right
top_right.intent: Controlled medium/large — visible corner hail without screen domination

bottom_right.label: Bottom right
bottom_right.intent: Controlled medium — tighter beam and particle travel

upper_center.label: Upper center
upper_center.intent: Large event-like field — achievement arrival zone

center_soft.label: Center soft
center_soft.intent: Largest presentation field — restrained event, not full-screen chaos

lower_center.label: Lower center
lower_center.intent: Restrained subtitle-safe — compact effect envelope above lower third

previewTiming.note: Workbench-only — preset duration maps to stable_hold_ms only. Entrance and exit animation ms are additive (not crammed into preset).

lifecycleModel.stable_hold_ms: Stable readable phase — duration presets map here

authoringReplay.note: Hails / Forge preview loop — shorter stable slice so operators see full entrance → stable → exit without waiting operator duration_ms. TV delivery still uses duration_ms as stable_hold_ms.

recommendedTvDefaults.note: Medium default hail at top_right — visible, elegant, Control Alt-native.
